name: arboliva
flavor_texts: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.
This Pokémon drives back enemies by launching its rich, aromatic oil at them with enough force to smash a boulder.
text: Arboliva is the Olive Pokémon. It is a grass and normal-type Pokémon. Abilities: seed-sower, harvest (hidden). Base stats — HP: 78, Attack: 69, Defense: 90, Sp. Atk: 125, Sp. Def: 109, Speed: 39. Evolution line: smoliv → dolliv → arboliva. Lore: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon. This Pokémon drives back enemies by launching its rich, aromatic oil at them with enough force to smash a boulder.
